text.value: Laboratory Report
Laboratory studies

tr.td: Ketones [Presence] in Urine by Test strip
Glucose [Mass/volume] in Urine by Test strip
Specific gravity of Urine by Test strip
pH of Urine by Test strip

Nitrite [Presence] in Urine by Test strip
Hemoglobin [Presence] in Urine by Test strip
Leukocyte esterase [Presence] in Urine by Test strip

Erythrocytes [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Epithelial cells [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field

Mucus [Presence] in Urine sediment by Light microscopy
Bacteria [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Bacteria identified in Urine by Culture

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Urinalysis shows significant leukocyturia, bacteriuria, positive nitrites, and >100,000 CFU/mL E. coli, consistent with a urinary tract infection. Presence of hematuria and low specific gravity are noted; no casts detected. No ketonuria or significant proteinuria. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of antibiotic therapy.

text.value: Francesco Beffa

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Civico Renzetti Lanciano
